description: This file implements an orchestrator service for AI-powered persona and workflow management. It handles starting orchestrations, linking documents, extracting and normalizing text, generating persona drafts via placeholder AI, finalizing personas, and running full orchestrations. It utilizes in-memory storage with optional persistence via repositories, and offers a rich set of API functions for managing orchestration workflows.

methods.name: getOrchestration
methods.description: Retrieve the orchestrations record for a specific buildId, or null if not found.

methods.name: startOrchestration
methods.description: Create and initialize an orchestration record and associated build, returning both.

methods.name: linkUploadToBuild
methods.description: Associate an upload batch and document IDs with a build's orchestration.

methods.name: extractAndNormalizeForBuild
methods.description: Load latest extracted text for linked documents, combine, normalize, and update orchestration.

methods.name: generatePersonaDraftForBuild
methods.description: Generate a persona draft (placeholder AI) for a build, optionally creating a persona in memory.

methods.name: finalizePersonaForBuild
methods.description: Finalize and save a persona for a build, creating a version if requested.

methods.name: runAllOrchestration
methods.description: Execute the full orchestration pipeline end-to-end, managing all steps and statuses.
